member.name: T:CL.Common.Assemblies.AssemblyHelper
member.summary: Provides reflection-based utilities for inspecting assemblies and their metadata.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.AssemblyHelper.GetName(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the name of the assembly containing .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.AssemblyHelper.GetVersion(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the version of the assembly containing .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.AssemblyHelper.GetDescription(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the value, or empty string.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.AssemblyHelper.GetTitle(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the value, or empty string.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.AssemblyHelper.GetCompany(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the value, or empty string.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.AssemblyHelper.GetProduct(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the value, or empty string.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.AssemblyHelper.GetInformationalVersion(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns the value, or the version string.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.AssemblyHelper.GetMetadata(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns a dictionary containing key assembly metadata for the given object's assembly. Keys: Name, Version, InformationalVersion, Description, Title, Company, Product.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.AssemblyHelper.LoadFrom(System.String)
member.summary: Loads an assembly from the given file path.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.AssemblyHelper.GetFileMetadata(System.String)
member.summary: Loads an assembly from the given file and returns metadata about it.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.AssemblyHelper.GetImplementors``1(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Returns all types in an assembly that implement or inherit from .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.AssemblyHelper.GetTypesWithAttribute``1(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Returns all public classes in an assembly decorated with .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.AssemblyHelper.ReadEmbeddedResource(System.Reflection.Assembly,System.String)
member.summary: Reads an embedded resource from an assembly as a string.
member.param: The assembly containing the resource.
The fully-qualified resource name (e.g. "MyLib.Resources.template.html").

member.name: T:CL.Common.Assemblies.ReflectionHelper
member.summary: Provides reflection utilities for inspecting types, creating instances, and invoking methods dynamically.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.ReflectionHelper.CreateInstance``1
member.summary: Creates an instance of using its parameterless constructor.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.ReflectionHelper.CreateInstance(System.Type,System.Object[])
member.summary: Creates an instance of the given type with optional constructor arguments.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.ReflectionHelper.GetPropertyValue(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a property value by name using reflection.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.ReflectionHelper.SetPropertyValue(System.Object,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Sets a property value by name using reflection.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.ReflectionHelper.ToDictionary``1(``0)
member.summary: Returns all public instance properties of as a name → value dictionary.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.ReflectionHelper.InvokeMethod(System.Object,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Invokes a public instance method by name with optional arguments.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.ReflectionHelper.Implements``1(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns true if implements .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.ReflectionHelper.HasDefaultConstructor(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns true if has a parameterless public constructor.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Assemblies.ReflectionHelper.GetFriendlyName(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns the display name of a nullable type (e.g. "int?" instead of "Nullable`1").

member.name: T:CL.Common.Caching.ICache
member.summary: Defines a generic asynchronous cache contract supporting typed values, TTL-based expiry, prefix-based removal, and count queries. Implementations include for in-process caching.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Caching.ICache.SetAsync``1(System.String,``0,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Stores a value in the cache under the given key. If the key already exists it is overwritten.
member.typeparam: The type of value to store.
member.param: The cache key. Must not be null or empty.
The value to store.
Optional time-to-live. The entry expires and is removed after this duration. When null the entry does not expire.
member.returns: A that completes when the value has been stored.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Caching.ICache.GetAsync``1(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a value from the cache by key. Returns the default value for when the key is not found or has expired.
member.typeparam: The type of the cached value.
member.param: The cache key to look up. Must not be null or empty.
member.returns: The cached value, or default if not found or expired.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Caching.ICache.ExistsAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether a key exists in the cache and has not expired.
member.param: The cache key to check. Must not be null or empty.
member.returns: true if the key exists and is not expired; otherwise false.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Caching.ICache.RemoveAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a single entry from the cache by key. Does nothing if the key does not exist.
member.param: The cache key to remove. Must not be null or empty.
member.returns: A that completes when the entry has been removed.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Caching.ICache.RemoveByPrefixAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Removes all cache entries whose keys begin with the specified prefix.
member.param: The key prefix to match. Must not be null or empty.
member.returns: A that completes when all matching entries have been removed.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Caching.ICache.ClearAsync
member.summary: Removes all entries from the cache regardless of their TTL.
member.returns: A that completes when the cache has been cleared.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Caching.ICache.GetCountAsync
member.summary: Returns the number of non-expired entries currently in the cache.
member.returns: A whose result is the count of live cache entries.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Caching.MemoryCache
member.summary: Thread-safe in-process cache backed by a . Supports optional TTL per entry and runs a background cleanup loop to evict expired entries. Implements and .

member.name: P:CL.Common.Caching.MemoryCache.CacheEntry.Value
member.summary: The stored value (boxed).

member.name: P:CL.Common.Caching.MemoryCache.CacheEntry.ExpiresAt
member.summary: UTC time when this entry expires, or null if it never expires.

member.name: P:CL.Common.Caching.MemoryCache.CacheEntry.CreatedAt
member.summary: UTC time when this entry was created.

member.name: P:CL.Common.Caching.MemoryCache.CacheEntry.IsExpired
member.summary: Returns true if the entry has passed its expiry time.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Caching.MemoryCache.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Initialises a new and starts the background cleanup loop.
member.param: How often the cleanup loop runs to evict expired entries. Default: 60 seconds.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Caching.MemoryCache.Dispose
member.summary: Cancels the background cleanup loop and releases all resources.

member.name: T:CL.Common.CommonLibrary
member.summary: CL.Common library — general-purpose utility toolkit for CodeLogic 3 applications. Provides Security, Generators, Caching, Compression, Imaging, Networking, Data, FileHandling, Conversion, Parser, Time, and String utilities. No external service dependencies — always healthy when initialized.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Compression.CompressionHelper
member.summary: Provides GZip, Brotli, and LZ4 compression and decompression utilities. All methods return to signal failures without throwing.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Compression.CompressionHelper.CompressGzip(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Compresses the given byte array using GZip compression.
member.param: The raw bytes to compress. Must not be null.
member.returns: A containing the compressed bytes on success, or a failure result with an error description.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Compression.CompressionHelper.DecompressGzip(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decompresses a GZip-compressed byte array.
member.param: The GZip-compressed bytes to decompress. Must not be null.
member.returns: A containing the decompressed bytes on success, or a failure result if decompression fails.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Compression.CompressionHelper.CompressBrotli(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Compresses the given byte array using Brotli compression.
member.param: The raw bytes to compress. Must not be null.
member.returns: A containing the compressed bytes on success, or a failure result with an error description.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Compression.CompressionHelper.DecompressBrotli(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decompresses a Brotli-compressed byte array.
member.param: The Brotli-compressed bytes to decompress. Must not be null.
member.returns: A containing the decompressed bytes on success, or a failure result if decompression fails.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Compression.CompressionHelper.CompressLz4(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Compresses the given byte array using LZ4 compression (via K4os.Compression.LZ4.Streams). LZ4 offers very fast compression at the cost of slightly lower compression ratios than GZip.
member.param: The raw bytes to compress. Must not be null.
member.returns: A containing the LZ4-compressed bytes on success, or a failure result with an error description.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Compression.CompressionHelper.DecompressLz4(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decompresses an LZ4-compressed byte array produced by .
member.param: The LZ4-compressed bytes to decompress. Must not be null.
member.returns: A containing the decompressed bytes on success, or a failure result if decompression fails.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Compression.CompressionHelper.CompressString(System.String)
member.summary: Compresses a UTF-8 string using GZip and returns the result as a Base64-encoded string. Useful for storing compressed text in text-based storage systems.
member.param: The text to compress. Must not be null.
member.returns: A containing the Base64-encoded GZip-compressed text on success, or a failure result with an error description.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Compression.CompressionHelper.DecompressString(System.String)
member.summary: Decompresses a Base64-encoded GZip-compressed string produced by .
member.param: The Base64-encoded compressed string. Must not be null.
member.returns: A containing the original UTF-8 text on success, or a failure result if decompression or Base64 decoding fails.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Conversion.TypeConverter
member.summary: Provides safe type conversion utilities that return instead of throwing exceptions.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Conversion.TypeConverter.Convert``1(System.Object)
member.summary: Attempts to convert to type . Supports all primitive types, enums, and types with a TypeConverter.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Conversion.TypeConverter.TryConvert``1(System.Object,``0@)
member.summary: Tries to convert to . Returns false and sets to default on failure.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Conversion.TypeConverter.ToInt(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a string to .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Conversion.TypeConverter.ToLong(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a string to .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Conversion.TypeConverter.ToDouble(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a string to .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Conversion.TypeConverter.ToBool(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a string to . Accepts: true/false, yes/no, 1/0, on/off (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:CL.Common.Conversion.TypeConverter.ToDateTime(System.String)
member.summary: Parses an ISO 8601 or common date string to .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Conversion.TypeConverter.ToEnum``1(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a string to an enum value of type . Case-insensitive. Also accepts numeric string values.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Conversion.TypeConverter.ToGuid(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a string to a .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Conversion.TypeConverter.ToDecimal(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a string to a .

member.name: T:CL.Common.Data.JsonHelper
member.summary: Provides JSON serialization, deserialization, file I/O, validation, and merging utilities. Uses System.Text.Json as the primary engine. All operations that can fail return or .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Data.JsonHelper.Serialize``1(``0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Serializes the given object to a JSON string.
member.typeparam: The type of the object to serialize.
member.param: The object to serialize. May be null.
When true, output is formatted with indentation. Default: false.
member.returns: A containing the JSON string on success, or a failure result.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Data.JsonHelper.Deserialize``1(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes a JSON string into an instance of .
member.param: The JSON string to deserialize.
member.returns: A containing the deserialized value on success, or a failure result.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Data.JsonHelper.SerializeToFile``1(``0,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Serializes an object to JSON and writes it to the specified file path.
member.typeparam: The type of the object to serialize.
member.param: The object to serialize and write.
The file path to write to. The parent directory is created if it does not exist.
When true, the written JSON is formatted with indentation. Default: true.
member.returns: A indicating success or failure.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Data.JsonHelper.DeserializeFromFile``1(System.String)
member.summary: Reads a JSON file from disk and deserializes its contents into an instance of .
member.param: The path to the JSON file to read.
member.returns: A containing the deserialized value on success, or a failure result.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Data.JsonHelper.IsValidJson(System.String)
member.summary: Validates whether the given string is well-formed JSON.
member.param: The string to validate. Returns false for null or whitespace.
member.returns: true if the string is valid JSON; otherwise false.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Data.JsonHelper.Merge(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Merges two JSON objects. Properties from overwrite matching properties in ; non-conflicting properties from both are preserved.
member.param: The base JSON object string.
The overlay JSON object string whose values take precedence.
member.returns: A containing the merged JSON string on success, or a failure result.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Data.JsonHelper.GetProperty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to extract the raw JSON text of a top-level property from a JSON string.
member.param: The JSON object string to read from.
The property name to look up (case-sensitive).
member.returns: A containing the raw JSON value string on success, or a failure result.

member.name: T:CL.Common.FileHandling.FileSystem
member.summary: Provides safe file system operations that return instead of throwing exceptions. All async methods are non-blocking.

member.name: M:CL.Common.FileHandling.FileSystem.ReadAllTextAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Reads all text from a file asynchronously.

member.name: M:CL.Common.FileHandling.FileSystem.WriteAllTextAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Writes text to a file asynchronously, creating the file and any missing directories.

member.name: M:CL.Common.FileHandling.FileSystem.ReadAllBytesAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Reads all bytes from a file asynchronously.

member.name: M:CL.Common.FileHandling.FileSystem.WriteAllBytesAsync(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Writes bytes to a file asynchronously, creating any missing directories.

member.name: M:CL.Common.FileHandling.FileSystem.CopyAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Copies a file asynchronously.
member.param: When true, overwrites the destination if it exists.

member.name: M:CL.Common.FileHandling.FileSystem.MoveAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Moves a file, creating any missing destination directories.

member.name: M:CL.Common.FileHandling.FileSystem.DeleteFile(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a file. Returns success even if the file does not exist.

member.name: M:CL.Common.FileHandling.FileSystem.CreateDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a directory and all intermediate directories. Succeeds if already exists.

member.name: M:CL.Common.FileHandling.FileSystem.GetFilesAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Lists all files in a directory matching the given search pattern.

member.name: M:CL.Common.FileHandling.FileSystem.GetFileSizeBytes(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the size of a file in bytes.

member.name: M:CL.Common.FileHandling.FileSystem.FileExists(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the file exists.

member.name: M:CL.Common.FileHandling.FileSystem.DirectoryExists(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the directory exists.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Generators.IdGenerator
member.summary: Provides a variety of ID and token generation strategies for use in applications. All methods are thread-safe and use cryptographically random sources where appropriate.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.IdGenerator.NewGuid
member.summary: Generates a new as a standard formatted string (e.g., "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-...").
member.returns: A new uppercase GUID string with dashes.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.IdGenerator.NewGuidNoDashes
member.summary: Generates a new as a compact 32-character hexadecimal string with no dashes.
member.returns: A 32-character lowercase hexadecimal string.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.IdGenerator.Sequential
member.summary: Generates a sequential integer ID using an atomic counter. Safe for use within a single process lifetime; resets on restart.
member.returns: A monotonically increasing value.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.IdGenerator.Timestamp
member.summary: Generates a timestamp-based ID using the current UTC time as ticks.
member.returns: A string containing the UTC value.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.IdGenerator.TimestampWithPrefix(System.String)
member.summary: Generates a timestamp-based ID with a custom prefix. Format: "PREFIX_ticks".
member.param: The prefix to prepend to the timestamp. Must not be null.
member.returns: A string in the format "{prefix}_{ticks}".

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.IdGenerator.Random(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a cryptographically random alphanumeric string of the specified length.
member.param: The number of characters to generate. Default: 16.
member.returns: A random alphanumeric string of the specified length.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.IdGenerator.RandomHex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a cryptographically random hexadecimal string of the specified length.
member.param: The number of hex characters to generate. Default: 32.
member.returns: A lowercase hexadecimal string of the specified length.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.IdGenerator.RandomBase64(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a cryptographically random Base64-encoded string from the specified number of bytes.
member.param: The number of random bytes before Base64 encoding. Default: 24.
member.returns: A Base64-encoded string (length will be approximately byteLength * 4/3 characters).

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.IdGenerator.UrlSafe(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a cryptographically random URL-safe string using Base64url characters (A-Z a-z 0-9 - _).
member.param: The number of characters to generate. Default: 22.
member.returns: A URL-safe random string of the specified length.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.IdGenerator.NanoId(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a NanoID — a compact, URL-safe, cryptographically random identifier. Uses the NanoID alphabet (A-Z a-z 0-9 _ -).
member.param: The number of characters to generate. Default: 21.
member.returns: A NanoID string of the specified length.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.IdGenerator.Sortable
member.summary: Generates a sortable ID combining a UTC timestamp with a random suffix. IDs generated later will sort lexicographically after earlier ones. Format: "{ticks:D20}_{randomHex8}".
member.returns: A sortable string ID.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Generators.PasswordStrength
member.summary: Describes the estimated strength of a password based on entropy analysis.

member.name: F:CL.Common.Generators.PasswordStrength.VeryWeak
member.summary: Very weak password — easily guessable (e.g., fewer than 6 characters, no complexity).

member.name: F:CL.Common.Generators.PasswordStrength.Weak
member.summary: Weak password — minimal complexity.

member.name: F:CL.Common.Generators.PasswordStrength.Medium
member.summary: Medium strength — acceptable for non-critical use.

member.name: F:CL.Common.Generators.PasswordStrength.Strong
member.summary: Strong password — suitable for most use cases.

member.name: F:CL.Common.Generators.PasswordStrength.VeryStrong
member.summary: Very strong password — high entropy, suitable for sensitive accounts.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Generators.PasswordGenerator
member.summary: Generates secure random passwords, passphrases, and PINs. All generation methods use for cryptographic randomness.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.PasswordGenerator.Generate(System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a random password of the specified length using a configurable character set.
member.param: The desired password length. Default: 16.
Whether to include lowercase letters. Default: true.
Whether to include uppercase letters. Default: true.
Whether to include digits. Default: true.
Whether to include special characters. Default: true.
member.returns: A cryptographically random password string.
member.exception: Thrown when no character sets are selected or length is less than 1.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.PasswordGenerator.GenerateStrong(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a strong password that guarantees at least one character from each specified category. Minimum length is 12.
member.param: The desired password length. Must be at least 12. Default: 16.
member.returns: A strong password with guaranteed character category coverage.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.PasswordGenerator.GeneratePassphrase(System.Int32,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a memorable passphrase by combining random words with a separator.
member.param: The number of words in the passphrase. Default: 4.
The character or string separating words. Default: "-".
Whether to capitalize the first letter of each word. Default: true.
member.returns: A passphrase made up of random dictionary words.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.PasswordGenerator.GeneratePin(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a numeric PIN of the specified length.
member.param: The number of digits in the PIN. Default: 6.
member.returns: A string of random digits.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Generators.PasswordGenerator.CalculateStrength(System.String)
member.summary: Estimates the strength of a password based on its length and character variety.
member.param: The password to evaluate. Must not be null.
member.returns: A enum value representing the estimated strength.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Imaging.ImageFormat
member.summary: Specifies the target output format for image conversion operations.

member.name: F:CL.Common.Imaging.ImageFormat.Jpeg
member.summary: JPEG format — lossy compression, suitable for photographs.

member.name: F:CL.Common.Imaging.ImageFormat.Png
member.summary: PNG format — lossless compression, suitable for graphics and transparency.

member.name: F:CL.Common.Imaging.ImageFormat.Webp
member.summary: WebP format — modern format with both lossy and lossless modes.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Imaging.CLU_Imaging
member.summary: Provides image processing utilities including validation, resizing, conversion, thumbnail creation, and Base64 encoding. All operations are implemented using SkiaSharp. Methods that can fail return or instead of throwing.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Imaging.CLU_Imaging.IsValidSize(System.IO.Stream,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks whether the image contained in the given stream does not exceed the specified dimensions.
member.param: A readable stream containing image data. Must not be null.
Maximum allowed width in pixels.
Maximum allowed height in pixels.
member.returns: true if the image dimensions are within the allowed bounds; otherwise false.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Imaging.CLU_Imaging.IsValidAspectRatio(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Checks whether the image in the stream has a valid (non-degenerate) aspect ratio. An aspect ratio is considered invalid if either dimension is zero.
member.param: A readable stream containing image data. Must not be null.
member.returns: true if the image has non-zero width and height; otherwise false.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Imaging.CLU_Imaging.ConvertImage(System.IO.Stream,CL.Common.Imaging.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Converts the image in the given stream to the specified .
member.param: A readable stream containing the source image. Must not be null.
The target image format.
member.returns: A containing a with the converted image data on success, or a failure result with a descriptive error.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Imaging.CLU_Imaging.ResizeImage(System.IO.Stream,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Resizes the image in the given stream to the specified dimensions.
member.param: A readable stream containing the source image. Must not be null.
The desired output width in pixels.
The desired output height in pixels.
When true, the image is cropped to fill the exact target dimensions. When false, the image is scaled to fit within the bounds, preserving aspect ratio. Default: true.
member.returns: A containing a with PNG-encoded resized image data on success, or a failure result with a descriptive error.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Imaging.CLU_Imaging.ImageToBase64(System.String)
member.summary: Reads an image file from disk and returns its contents as a Base64-encoded string.
member.param: The full path to the image file. Must not be null or empty.
member.returns: A containing the Base64-encoded image string on success, or a failure result if the file is missing or cannot be read.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Imaging.CLU_Imaging.ResizeImage(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Resizes an image from disk and saves it to the specified output path.
member.param: The full path to the source image file. Must not be null or empty.
The full path where the resized image will be saved. Must not be null or empty.
The desired output width in pixels.
The desired output height in pixels.
When true, the image is scaled to fit within the bounds while preserving the aspect ratio. When false, the image is stretched to exactly × . Default: true.
member.returns: A indicating success or failure.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Imaging.CLU_Imaging.ConvertImageFormat(System.String,System.String,CL.Common.Imaging.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Converts an image file to the specified format and saves it to the output path.
member.param: The full path to the source image file. Must not be null or empty.
The full path where the converted image will be saved. Must not be null or empty.
The target image format.
member.returns: A indicating success or failure.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Imaging.CLU_Imaging.CreateThumbnail(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a square thumbnail from the specified image and saves it to the output path. The image is cropped to a square centered on the image before scaling.
member.param: The full path to the source image file. Must not be null or empty.
The full path where the thumbnail will be saved. Must not be null or empty.
The width and height (in pixels) of the square thumbnail. Default: 100.
member.returns: A indicating success or failure.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Imaging.CLU_Imaging.GetImageDimensions(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the pixel dimensions of an image file.
member.param: The full path to the image file. Must not be null or empty.
member.returns: A containing a tuple of (width, height) in pixels on success, or a failure result if the file is missing or cannot be decoded.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Networking.PingResult
member.summary: Result returned by a ping operation.
member.param: Whether the ping received a reply.
Round-trip time in milliseconds, or -1 if the ping failed.
The hostname or IP address that was pinged.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Networking.PingResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Int64,System.String)
member.summary: Result returned by a ping operation.
member.param: Whether the ping received a reply.
Round-trip time in milliseconds, or -1 if the ping failed.
The hostname or IP address that was pinged.

member.name: P:CL.Common.Networking.PingResult.Success
member.summary: Whether the ping received a reply.

member.name: P:CL.Common.Networking.PingResult.RoundTripMs
member.summary: Round-trip time in milliseconds, or -1 if the ping failed.

member.name: P:CL.Common.Networking.PingResult.Host
member.summary: The hostname or IP address that was pinged.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Networking.SubnetInfo
member.summary: Calculated information about a subnet.
member.param: The network address (host bits zeroed).
The broadcast address (host bits all set).
The subnet mask as provided.
The number of usable host addresses in the subnet.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Networking.SubnetInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculated information about a subnet.
member.param: The network address (host bits zeroed).
The broadcast address (host bits all set).
The subnet mask as provided.
The number of usable host addresses in the subnet.

member.name: P:CL.Common.Networking.SubnetInfo.NetworkAddress
member.summary: The network address (host bits zeroed).

member.name: P:CL.Common.Networking.SubnetInfo.BroadcastAddress
member.summary: The broadcast address (host bits all set).

member.name: P:CL.Common.Networking.SubnetInfo.SubnetMask
member.summary: The subnet mask as provided.

member.name: P:CL.Common.Networking.SubnetInfo.UsableHosts
member.summary: The number of usable host addresses in the subnet.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Networking.HopInfo
member.summary: Represents a single hop in a traceroute path.
member.param: The hop number (1-based).
The IP address or hostname of this hop, or "*" if it did not respond.
Round-trip time in milliseconds to this hop, or -1 if it timed out.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Networking.HopInfo.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Represents a single hop in a traceroute path.
member.param: The hop number (1-based).
The IP address or hostname of this hop, or "*" if it did not respond.
Round-trip time in milliseconds to this hop, or -1 if it timed out.

member.name: P:CL.Common.Networking.HopInfo.Hop
member.summary: The hop number (1-based).

member.name: P:CL.Common.Networking.HopInfo.Address
member.summary: The IP address or hostname of this hop, or "*" if it did not respond.

member.name: P:CL.Common.Networking.HopInfo.Ms
member.summary: Round-trip time in milliseconds to this hop, or -1 if it timed out.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Networking.NetworkPing
member.summary: Provides asynchronous network ping operations using ICMP.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Networking.NetworkPing.PingAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sends an ICMP echo (ping) request to the specified host and returns the result.
member.param: The hostname or IP address to ping. Must not be null or empty.
Timeout in milliseconds to wait for a reply. Default: 3000.
member.returns: A containing a on success, or a failure result if the operation throws an exception.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Networking.NetworkDns
member.summary: Provides asynchronous DNS lookup operations.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Networking.NetworkDns.LookupAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Resolves all IP addresses for the given hostname using the system DNS resolver.
member.param: The hostname or domain name to resolve. Must not be null or empty.
member.returns: A containing an array of IP address strings on success, or a failure result if the DNS lookup fails.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Networking.SubnetCalculator
member.summary: Provides subnet calculation utilities for IPv4 addresses.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Networking.SubnetCalculator.Calculate(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Calculates network address, broadcast address, and usable host count for the given IPv4 address and subnet mask.
member.param: An IPv4 address in dotted-decimal notation (e.g., "192.168.1.50"). Must not be null or empty.
A subnet mask in dotted-decimal notation (e.g., "255.255.255.0"). Must not be null or empty.
member.returns: A containing a on success, or a failure result if the inputs are invalid.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Networking.TraceRoute
member.summary: Provides asynchronous traceroute operations using ICMP with incrementing TTL values.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Networking.TraceRoute.TraceAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Traces the network route to the specified host by sending ICMP echo requests with increasing TTL values.
member.param: The hostname or IP address to trace to. Must not be null or empty.
The maximum number of hops to trace. Default: 30.
member.returns: A containing a list of records on success, or a failure result if an exception occurs.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Parser.CronExpression
member.summary: A parsed cron expression with individual field components. Cron format: MINUTES HOURS DAY_OF_MONTH MONTH DAY_OF_WEEK
member.param: The original expression string.
Minutes field (0-59).
Hours field (0-23).
Day of month field (1-31).
Month field (1-12).
Day of week field (0-6, Sunday = 0).

member.name: M:CL.Common.Parser.CronExpression.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: A parsed cron expression with individual field components. Cron format: MINUTES HOURS DAY_OF_MONTH MONTH DAY_OF_WEEK
member.param: The original expression string.
Minutes field (0-59).
Hours field (0-23).
Day of month field (1-31).
Month field (1-12).
Day of week field (0-6, Sunday = 0).

member.name: P:CL.Common.Parser.CronExpression.Raw
member.summary: The original expression string.

member.name: P:CL.Common.Parser.CronExpression.Minutes
member.summary: Minutes field (0-59).

member.name: P:CL.Common.Parser.CronExpression.Hours
member.summary: Hours field (0-23).

member.name: P:CL.Common.Parser.CronExpression.DayOfMonth
member.summary: Day of month field (1-31).

member.name: P:CL.Common.Parser.CronExpression.Month
member.summary: Month field (1-12).

member.name: P:CL.Common.Parser.CronExpression.DayOfWeek
member.summary: Day of week field (0-6, Sunday = 0).

member.name: T:CL.Common.Parser.CronParser
member.summary: Parses and evaluates cron expressions in standard 5-field format. Supports: *, */n (step), a-b (range), a,b,c (list), and exact values.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Parser.CronParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a 5-field cron expression string into a .
member.param: A 5-field cron expression, e.g. "0 */6 * * *".

member.name: M:CL.Common.Parser.CronParser.IsValid(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the expression is a valid 5-field cron string.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Parser.CronParser.GetNextOccurrence(System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Returns the next UTC occurrence of the cron schedule after the given time. Searches up to 1 year ahead. Accuracy is to the minute.
member.param: A valid 5-field cron expression.
Start searching from this point. Defaults to .

member.name: T:CL.Common.Security.Encryption
member.summary: Provides AES-256-GCM authenticated encryption and decryption utilities with PBKDF2 key derivation. AES-GCM is an AEAD (Authenticated Encryption with Associated Data) cipher that provides both confidentiality and integrity. Unlike AES-CBC, it detects tampering and rejects modified ciphertext.

remarks.para: Wire format: all output is structured as salt (16 bytes) + nonce (12 bytes) + tag (16 bytes) + ciphertext.

Breaking change from earlier versions: this class previously used AES-CBC which provides no authentication and is vulnerable to padding-oracle attacks. Any data encrypted with the previous (AES-CBC) implementation cannot be decrypted with this version.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Security.Encryption.EncryptAes(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Encrypts a plaintext string using AES-256-GCM with a PBKDF2-derived key. The output is a Base64-encoded string containing the salt, nonce, authentication tag, and ciphertext.
member.param: The plaintext to encrypt. Must not be null.
The password used to derive the encryption key. Must not be null.
member.returns: A Base64-encoded string containing salt (16 bytes) + nonce (12 bytes) + tag (16 bytes) + ciphertext.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Security.Encryption.DecryptAes(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Decrypts a Base64-encoded ciphertext string produced by .
member.param: The Base64-encoded ciphertext (salt + nonce + tag + ciphertext). Must not be null.
The password used during encryption. Must not be null.
member.returns: The original plaintext string.
member.exception: Thrown when decryption or authentication fails (wrong password, corrupted data, or tampered ciphertext).

member.name: M:CL.Common.Security.Encryption.EncryptBytes(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Encrypts a byte array using AES-256-GCM with a PBKDF2-derived key.
member.param: The data to encrypt. Must not be null.
The password used to derive the encryption key. Must not be null.
member.returns: A byte array containing salt (16 bytes) + nonce (12 bytes) + tag (16 bytes) + ciphertext.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Security.Encryption.DecryptBytes(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Decrypts a byte array produced by . AES-GCM verifies the authentication tag before returning plaintext — any modification to the encrypted data causes a .
member.param: The encrypted data containing salt (16 bytes) + nonce (12 bytes) + tag (16 bytes) + ciphertext. Must not be null.
The password used during encryption. Must not be null.
member.returns: The decrypted plaintext bytes.
member.exception: Thrown when authentication fails (wrong password, corrupted data, or tampered ciphertext).

member.name: M:CL.Common.Security.Encryption.GenerateKey(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a cryptographically random Base64-encoded key of the specified byte length.
member.param: The number of random bytes to generate. Default: 32 (256-bit key).
member.returns: A Base64-encoded string representing the random key.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Security.Hashing
member.summary: Provides hashing utilities including SHA-256, SHA-512, MD5 (obsolete), PBKDF2 password hashing, salt generation, and HMAC variants. All methods are thread-safe and stateless.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Security.Hashing.Sha256(System.String)
member.summary: Computes the SHA-256 hash of the given UTF-8 string.
member.param: The string to hash. Must not be null.
member.returns: A lowercase hexadecimal string representing the SHA-256 hash.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Security.Hashing.Sha512(System.String)
member.summary: Computes the SHA-512 hash of the given UTF-8 string.
member.param: The string to hash. Must not be null.
member.returns: A lowercase hexadecimal string representing the SHA-512 hash.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Security.Hashing.Md5(System.String)
member.summary: Computes the MD5 hash of the given UTF-8 string.
member.param: The string to hash. Must not be null.
member.returns: A lowercase hexadecimal string representing the MD5 hash.
member.remarks: MD5 is cryptographically broken and should not be used for security-sensitive purposes. Use or instead.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Security.Hashing.HashPassword(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Hashes a password using PBKDF2-SHA256 with a random salt. The returned string contains both the salt and hash encoded as Base64, suitable for storage in a database.
member.param: The plaintext password to hash. Must not be null.
The number of PBKDF2 iterations. Higher values are more secure but slower. Default: 100000.
member.returns: A Base64-encoded string containing the 16-byte salt followed by the 32-byte hash.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Security.Hashing.VerifyPassword(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Verifies a plaintext password against a hashed password produced by . Uses constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks.
member.param: The plaintext password to verify. Must not be null.
The Base64-encoded salt+hash string returned by . Must not be null.
The number of PBKDF2 iterations used when hashing. Must match the value used in . Default: 100000.
member.returns: true if the password matches the hash; otherwise false.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Security.Hashing.GenerateSalt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a cryptographically random salt encoded as Base64.
member.param: The number of random bytes to generate. Default: 16.
member.returns: A Base64-encoded string of random bytes.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Security.Hashing.HmacSha256(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Computes an HMAC-SHA256 of the given input using the specified key.
member.param: The message to authenticate. Must not be null.
The secret key. Must not be null.
member.returns: A lowercase hexadecimal string of the HMAC-SHA256 result.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Security.Hashing.HmacSha512(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Computes an HMAC-SHA512 of the given input using the specified key.
member.param: The message to authenticate. Must not be null.
The secret key. Must not be null.
member.returns: A lowercase hexadecimal string of the HMAC-SHA512 result.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper
member.summary: Provides string manipulation utilities: truncation, slugification, case conversion, HTML stripping, and more.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.Truncate(System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Truncates a string to characters, appending if truncation occurs.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.ToSlug(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a string to a URL-friendly slug. Lowercases, replaces spaces/underscores with hyphens, removes non-alphanumeric characters, and collapses multiple hyphens.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.ToCamelCase(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a string to camelCase. Example: "hello world" → "helloWorld"

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.ToPascalCase(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a string to PascalCase. Example: "hello world" → "HelloWorld"

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.ToSnakeCase(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a string to snake_case. Example: "HelloWorld" → "hello_world"

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.ToKebabCase(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a string to kebab-case. Example: "HelloWorld" → "hello-world"

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.StripHtml(System.String)
member.summary: Removes all HTML tags from the input, returning plain text. Does not decode HTML entities.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.WordCount(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the number of words in the text (split on whitespace).

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.Repeat(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Repeats exactly times.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.Reverse(System.String)
member.summary: Reverses the characters in a string.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.ContainsAny(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Returns true if contains any of the given substrings. Case-sensitive by default.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.CountOccurrences(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Counts how many times appears in .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.ExtractNumbers(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts all numeric sequences from the text and returns them as longs.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.IsAscii(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the string contains only ASCII characters.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringHelper.Capitalize(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the first character to uppercase and the rest to lowercase.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Strings.StringValidator
member.summary: Provides common string validation methods. All methods are stateless and thread-safe.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringValidator.IsEmail(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the string is a valid email address.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringValidator.IsUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the string is a valid absolute URL (http or https).

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringValidator.IsPhoneNumber(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the string looks like a phone number (7–20 digits, optional +, spaces, dashes, parens).

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringValidator.IsNumeric(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the string contains only digits and an optional leading minus/decimal point.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringValidator.IsAlphanumeric(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the string contains only letters and digits (a-z, A-Z, 0-9).

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringValidator.IsIPv4(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the string is a valid IPv4 address (e.g. "192.168.1.1").

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringValidator.IsIPv6(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the string is a valid IPv6 address.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringValidator.IsGuid(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the string is a valid GUID in standard format.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringValidator.HasMinLength(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns true if the string length is at least characters.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringValidator.HasMaxLength(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns true if the string length does not exceed characters.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringValidator.MatchesPattern(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the entire string matches the given regular expression pattern.
member.param: The string to test.
A .NET regular expression pattern.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringValidator.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the string is null or consists only of whitespace.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Strings.StringValidator.IsNotEmpty(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the string is not null and not whitespace.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper
member.summary: Provides date and time utility methods including Unix timestamps, ISO 8601 parsing, business day calculations, and relative time strings.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.ToUnixTimestamp(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Converts a to a Unix timestamp (seconds since 1970-01-01 UTC).

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.FromUnixTimestamp(System.Int64)
member.summary: Converts a Unix timestamp (seconds) to a UTC .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.ToUnixMilliseconds(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Converts a to a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.ToIso8601(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Formats a as an ISO 8601 round-trip string (e.g. 2026-04-06T12:00:00.000Z).

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.FromIso8601(System.String)
member.summary: Parses an ISO 8601 string to a UTC .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.GetAge(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Calculates age in whole years from a birth date to today.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.IsWeekend(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Returns true if the date falls on a Saturday or Sunday.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.IsBusinessDay(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Returns true if the date is a Monday–Friday (no public holiday awareness).

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.NextBusinessDay(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Returns the next Monday–Friday after . Returns the same day if already a business day.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.StartOfDay(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Returns midnight (00:00:00) on the same day.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.EndOfDay(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Returns 23:59:59.999 on the same day.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.StartOfWeek(System.DateTime,System.DayOfWeek)
member.summary: Returns the first day of the week containing .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.StartOfMonth(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Returns the first day of the month.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.EndOfMonth(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Returns the last day of the month at 23:59:59.999.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Time.DateTimeHelper.ToRelativeString(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Returns a human-readable relative time string. Examples: "just now", "3 minutes ago", "in 2 hours", "yesterday".

member.name: T:CL.Common.Web.HtmlHelper
member.summary: Provides HTML sanitization and trimming utilities.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HtmlHelper.StripTags(System.String)
member.summary: Strips all HTML tags, returning plain text. Does not decode HTML entities (e.g. & stays as &).

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HtmlHelper.Sanitize(System.String)
member.summary: Sanitizes HTML by removing script tags, style tags, and inline event handlers. Safe for displaying user-provided content that may contain limited HTML.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HtmlHelper.TrimWhitespace(System.String)
member.summary: Trims whitespace inside HTML, collapsing multiple spaces/newlines to single spaces. Preserves HTML structure.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HtmlHelper.Encode(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes a plain-text string so it is safe to embed in HTML. Converts < > & " to their HTML entity equivalents.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HtmlHelper.Decode(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes HTML entities back to plain text.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HtmlHelper.TruncateText(System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Truncates HTML content to approximately visible characters, stripping tags first. Appends if truncated.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Web.HttpClientHelper
member.summary: Provides typed, async HTTP request helpers built on . Uses for all operations so callers never need to catch exceptions. Create one instance per base URL and reuse it.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HttpClientHelper.GetStringAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Sends a GET request and returns the response body as a string.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HttpClientHelper.GetJsonAsync``1(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Sends a GET request and deserializes the JSON response to .

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HttpClientHelper.PostJsonAsync``1(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,``0,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Sends a POST request with a JSON body and returns the response string.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HttpClientHelper.PostJsonAsync``2(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,``0,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Sends a POST request and deserializes the JSON response.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HttpClientHelper.PutJsonAsync``1(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,``0,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Sends a PUT request with a JSON body.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HttpClientHelper.DeleteAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Sends a DELETE request.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Web.HttpHeaderHelper
member.summary: Provides utilities for working with HTTP headers, client detection, and IP address utilities. Framework-agnostic — pass header values directly.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HttpHeaderHelper.GetPrimaryLocale(System.String)
member.summary: Parses an Accept-Language header value and returns the preferred culture. Example: "da-DK,da;q=0.9,en-US;q=0.8" → "da-DK"

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HttpHeaderHelper.GetEffectiveClientIp(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Determines the most accurate public-facing client IP address. Checks X-Forwarded-For first, falls back to the remote address.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HttpHeaderHelper.IsPrivateIp(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the IP address is in a private/RFC1918 range or loopback.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HttpHeaderHelper.IsBot(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the User-Agent string matches known bot/crawler patterns.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HttpHeaderHelper.IsMobile(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the User-Agent suggests a mobile device.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HttpHeaderHelper.AcceptsJson(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the Accept header includes application/json.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.HttpHeaderHelper.GetHeader(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Returns the value of a header by name (case-insensitive) from a dictionary.

member.name: T:CL.Common.Web.UrlHelper
member.summary: Provides URL parsing, building, and encoding utilities.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.UrlHelper.Encode(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes a string for safe use in a URL query string.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.UrlHelper.Decode(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes a URL-encoded string.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.UrlHelper.IsValid(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the string is a valid absolute HTTP or HTTPS URL.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.UrlHelper.Combine(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Combines a base URL and a relative path, handling trailing/leading slashes correctly. Example: Combine("https://api.example.com/", "/users") → "https://api.example.com/users"

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.UrlHelper.AppendQuery(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Appends query string parameters to a URL. Existing query strings are preserved.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.UrlHelper.ParseQuery(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a query string into a dictionary of key-value pairs. Example: "?foo=bar&baz=1" → { "foo": "bar", "baz": "1" }

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.UrlHelper.GetDomain(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts just the domain (host) from a URL. Returns empty string on failure.

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.UrlHelper.GetPath(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the path component from a URL (without query string or fragment).

member.name: M:CL.Common.Web.UrlHelper.IsHttps(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the URL uses HTTPS.
